description: EFA-2: the RESCUE artifact — Gym Acrobot-v1 exact spec (underactuated elbow, a in {-1,0,+1}, RK4). Flow K=1 genuinely fails here (bimodal pumping averages out: 54% zero-torque collapse in the hanging region); the energy-gated agency ladder CONVERTS escalation to solving.
observation: [cos(th1), sin(th1), cos(th2), sin(th2), w1/4pi, w2/9pi] — env obs with omega scaled by its spec bound (disclosed)
inference: act K: a += flow(obs, a, k/K)/K then round to nearest of {-1,0,1}. AGENCY (the point of this artifact): a1 = K=1; if potential(obs,a1) > tau: a = K=4; if still > tau: a = argmin_a potential(obs,a) over the 3 legal actions.
honesty: Distills a model-based DP demonstrator. THE CLAIM: the first EFA body where the energy gate RESCUES — K=1 fails (mode-average collapse, measured), the gated ladder restores 100% solve at ~6% escalation cost, capturing most of always-K=4's gain at a fraction of its compute. One seed.
